title: Runtime Settings Control Room
concept: A responsive tabbed operations workspace that treats the active Playground runtime profile as the primary object, making WordPress version, PHP version, language, network, multisite, older versions, reset, saved reload, save destinations, ZIP import replacement, and portability outcomes discoverable without hiding the live WordPress shell.
focus: responsive tabbed console with mobile bottom navigation
saved, local-directory, temporary, and imported storage consequences
flows: Change WordPress version, PHP version, language, older-version availability, network, and multisite controls, then apply either destructive unsaved reset or stored Save & Reload with progress and active runtime badge mutation.

Finish ZIP import end to end with source selection, replacement warning, cancel option, progress, success state, database size mutation, active Playground title update, path update, saved-object row mutation, preview copy mutation, and transfer history.
Finish ZIP download end to end with source status, progress, generated archive result, and transfer history tied to the active Playground identity.

Save the current temporary Playground in browser storage or to a local directory with distinct destination consequences, progress, storage badge mutation, slug or folder identity, saved row transformation, and reset versus reload behavior.
Manage saved and unsaved Playgrounds with open/manage, rename mutation, delete confirmation, cancel, final row removal, and active-shell fallback to an Unsaved Playground.
Use Site Manager tabs for Settings, Files, Blueprint, Database, Logs, Export to GitHub, and Download as zip while the live WordPress preview remains visible.
Launch or replace through Vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import with account connection, Blueprint URL, and .zip import using route-specific inputs and constraints.
featureCoverage: Vanilla WordPress start route
WordPress PR preview with PR number or URL input
Gutenberg PR or branch preview with PR, URL, or branch input
GitHub import with account connection and token-not-stored consequence
Blueprint URL runner
Import .zip with selected source, replacement warning, cancel, progress, and active identity update
Blueprint gallery categories and search with representative subset labeled 6 shown of 43
Featured Blueprint shortcuts including Art Gallery, Coffee Shop, Feed Reader with the Friends Plugin, Gaming News, Non-profit Organization, and Personal Blog
Save temporary Playground in browser storage
Save to a local directory with folder permission and reconnect consequence
Save progress with file-copy counts
Saved, unsaved, local-directory, and temporary imported Playground list
Open, rename, delete confirmation, cancel, row removal, and fallback state
Current shell path input, refresh, Homepage, and WP Admin shortcuts
Temporary, browser-saved, local-directory, and imported storage badges
WordPress version, PHP version, language, older versions, network access, and multisite controls
Destructive Apply Settings & Reset Playground and stored Save & Reload consequences
Site Manager Settings, Files, Blueprint, Database, Logs, Export to GitHub, and Download as zip
File browser with create file, create folder, upload, browse files, selected wp-config.php editor, dirty state, save, and result state
Blueprint editor with Blueprint URL, validation, copy link, download bundle, run, replacement consequence, and result state
SQLite-backed database driver, path, size, database download, Adminer, and phpMyAdmin
Playground, WordPress, and PHP logs with realistic notice state
GitHub import and export
ZIP import and ZIP download
Database download and Blueprint bundle portability actions
Transfer history for saves, runtime changes, files, database, Blueprint, GitHub, ZIP, delete, rename, and navigation
